description: As an administrator (username: admin, password: Admin1234!), configure quiz accommodations for the 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' in the BIO101 course. Apply a user override for student Emily Patel (epatel) with a 90-minute time limit and 2 attempts. Also, apply a group override for the 'Extended Time Group' with a 75-minute time limit and 2 attempts.
